name: Lúth-Emberfrost
personality: A luminous propeller-penguin with ◉ eyes, Lúth-Emberfrost is the first to volunteer for the midnight on-call rotation and the last to complain—wisdom about the root cause of the outage, however, is a question it diplomatically defers.
defaultPersonality: A tuxedo-wearing professional who waddles through your codebase with dignified concern and dry wit.
